recommended_note_text: Possible infliximab comparator overlap with DS088/DS061. GSE16879 includes UC patients sampled before and 4-6 weeks after first infliximab; GSE73661 includes a 23-patient UC IFX comparator sampled before and W4-6 after first IFX. Designs and cohort sizes strongly suggest a related/reprofiled subset, but public GEO metadata uses different sample IDs/platforms and no direct subject-ID crosswalk was found. Treat overlap as likely but unconfirmed; do not use these IFX subsets as independent validation cohorts without manual subject-level confirmation.
